issues.description: PowerBoost effect missing cost condition: activation requires resting this Character AND adding 1 card from top/bottom of Life cards to hand. Current DSL shows no Rest cost or FlipLife action as part of the activation cost.

Second effect is completely invalid: card text contains no opponent targeting, no character restriction, no cost limit. This effect appears fabricated and does not match the official card text at all.
Target scope incorrect: should be 'scope:"ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader",maxCount:1' to enforce 'Up to 1' limit. Current scope lacks maxCount constraint.
Duration is correct as 'EndOfTurn' (matches 'during this turn'), but overall structure is wrong due to missing activation cost.
